title: Excel crashes on opening when pageSetup fitToPage and outlineProperties settings used at the same time
author: EugeniyKiyashko
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

When trying to use pageSetup fitToPage setting with outlineProperties setting at opening the excel gives an error message stating that there is an error:
"We found a problem with some content in 'File.xlsx'. Do you want us to try to recover as much as we can? If you trust the source of this workbook, click Yes."

Lib version: 4.0.1

## Steps To Reproduce

[Live Example](https://codepen.io/EugeniyKiyashko/pen/pogeqrd?editors=1010)

```javascript
  var worksheet = workbook.addWorksheet('SheetName', { pageSetup: { fitToPage: true } });
  worksheet.properties.outlineProperties = { summaryBelow: false };
```

## The expected behaviour:

The exported file opens without any errors.

Thank you very much in advance.

comments.author: novsstation
comments.body: I am getting the same behavior too.

comments.author: GaryHyland
comments.body:
Also keen to be able to set outlineSummary to above on a page that has fitToPage. Get a corrupt file warning and if I try to recover it shows a blank sheet and the log shows.

<recoveryLog xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main">
<logFileName>error491200_01.xml</logFileName>
<summary>Errors were detected in file 'C:\Users\gary\Downloads\blah.xlsx'</summary>
<removedParts>
<removedPart>Replaced Part: /xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml part with XML error. Load error. Line 2, column 0.</removedPart>
</removedParts>
</recoveryLog>

If I remove outlineProperties the XLSX is fine.

comments.author: strelok372
comments.body:
Hi!
I checked this problem and it comes from invalid order of tags
In a worksheet the tag <pageSetUpPr> must be in the end of, not at the beginning <sheetPr>
